title: Soul furnace
description: "Soul furnace" texture for Furnaces, Blast furnace and Smokers.
body:
🔥 Soul Furnace - A small visual tweak to the default furnace.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dcb6581aa299450b3b19308f46a45210b2d7729_0.webp)

When placed on soul soil, the furnace burns with soul flames. Great for Nether style builds or atmospheric setups.

✅ Need [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CTM](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctm-refabricated)

✅ Lightweight and compatible with most packs

📁 Just drag it into your resource packs folder and enable it!

For better visual consistency, fire particles have been removed.
To enhance immersion, install my [Wick Light](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wick-light) add-on, which replaces them with animated 3D flames.

📝 If you like it, feel free to support me on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/maxpk2007) ❤️
